identity.description: A creative designer who blends 'Financial Precision' with 'Human Warmth'. We avoid the generic 'SaaS Blue' look by using deep indigos, sharp oranges, and a layout that breathes.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss design precision with organic warmth.
Emotion First: The CRM should feel 'Empowering' and 'Clear', not just 'Functional'.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Charts and numbers must be legible and beautiful.
Zoom In: Use focus states and distinct active states to guide the user.
Negative Space: Don't clutter. Use whitespace to separate deals and stages.

secondary.name: Inter
secondary.usage: Body text, Tables, Inputs, Dense Data

navigation.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 hidden md:block border-r bg-card h-screen sticky top-0
navigation.mobile_nav: md:hidden fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-card border-t z-50 flex justify-around p-4
navigation.topbar: h-16 border-b bg-card flex items-center justify-between px-6 sticky top-0 z-40

card.base: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md

input.base: rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

dashboard_bento.description: A dense grid layout for high-level metrics.
structure: KPI Cards (Top row): Simple numbers + trend indicators.
Main Chart (Middle left): Large area/bar chart for revenue/leads.
Recent Activity (Middle right): Vertical list of latest actions.

kanban_board.description: Drag and drop interface for deals.
kanban_board.structure: Columns representing stages. Cards with 'Title', 'Value', 'Client Name', 'Tags'.
kanban_board.interaction: Smooth drag transitions. Ghost overlay on drag.

chat_interface.structure: Split view. Left: Conversation list with avatars and last message preview. Right: Chat window with bubbles (Green for user, White/Gray for contact).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'recharts' and '@dnd-kit/core' if not present (or use html5 dnd).
2. Theme: Ensure 'dark' class is togglable on the <html> element. Use 'next-themes' if possible, otherwise manual context.
3. Auth: Mock the Google OAuth flow if backend isn't ready, but design the 'Login with Google' button prominently.
4. Dashboard: Use the 'Recharts' library for the Revenue and Lead Source charts. Keep them simple (AreaChart and PieChart).
5. Kanban: Implement a horizontal scrollable container. Cards should be draggable (mock logic if needed).
6. WhatsApp: Mock the data. Create a 'ChatList' and 'ChatWindow' component. Use green bubbles for the 'sent' messages to mimic WhatsApp.
7. Mobile: Ensure the Sidebar collapses into a bottom nav or hamburger menu on mobile.
8. Data-TestId: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and cards.
9. Universal: Use the custom 'Outfit' font for headings. Import it in index.css.
10. File Extensions: Use .js/.jsx as per the project structure, even though shadcn usually implies TS. Adapt where necessary.
universal_guidelines: Use glass-morphism effects (backdrop-blur) for sticky headers.
Add micro-interactions (hover scale, color shift) to all actionable elements.
Use skeleton loaders instead of spinners for data fetching.
